summary: Player controller — character initialization, move selection state machine, input processing, replay recording, and per-frame update for fighting game characters.

functions.name: replay_record
functions.summary: Record player state into 512-entry ring buffer (health, action ID, opponent health). NON_MATCHING.

functions.name: replay_set_overflow
functions.summary: Set replay overflow flag on object.

functions.name: replay_check_timeout
functions.summary: Check if replay playback should end (health <= 0 or timer expires).

functions.name: replay_playback
functions.summary: Replay playback callback — walks ring buffer and restores player states frame by frame. NON_MATCHING.

functions.name: replay_task_exec
functions.summary: Execute replay task + check for skip input.

functions.name: replay_start
functions.summary: Initialize replay playback — reset positions, objects, task queues, and load replay buffer.

functions.name: replay_init_delay
functions.summary: Wait 60 frames before starting replay playback.

functions.name: player_tick
functions.summary: Per-frame player update — task execution, transform sync, ground detection, AI transition checks.

functions.name: player_ai_check
functions.summary: Main player AI/combat callback (set as obj->x_0232396f). Checks hitboxes for attacks/grabs, triggers AI transitions, manages shadow/effect visibility.

functions.name: path_concat
functions.summary: Concatenate two strings: copy src then append extension.

functions.name: player_ai_cfg_init
functions.summary: Initialize player AI config — load tactic tables, set up brain state, handle handicap/stock.

functions.name: player_load_db
functions.summary: Load character .db file — parse file headers to populate player struct with move tables, frame data, transitions, animation counts. Also loads .MOV animation files.

functions.name: transform_remove
functions.summary: Unlink a Transform from its sibling list.

functions.name: player_transform_setup
functions.summary: Setup player camera-follow transforms and reset D_80052D64[] combo counters.

functions.name: player_resource_cb
functions.summary: Resource load callback — determines opponent character for loading mirror/high-res models.

functions.name: player_load_models
functions.summary: Build player file paths and load character models/textures via WAD system.

functions.name: light_flicker
functions.summary: Dynamic light flicker — periodically randomizes light color intensity.

functions.name: light_follow_bone5
functions.summary: Follow bone 5 transform position for light source.

functions.name: light_follow_root
functions.summary: Follow root transform position for light source.

functions.name: light_spawn_by_type
functions.summary: Spawn light object for player based on character type (fighting stance, shadow, costume variants).

functions.name: player_init
functions.summary: Full player initialization — load models, textures, animations, .db data, create task nodes (4 per player), set up shadow/effect renderers, AI brain, and lights.

functions.name: player_reinit
functions.summary: Reinitialize player for new round — reset position, health, task queue states.

functions.name: player_exec_state
functions.summary: Execute player state/transition — find matching frame event in move table, set up task with callback, delay, and params. Core state machine dispatcher. Returns TRUE on success.

functions.name: player_exec_move
functions.summary: Execute a move by ID — looks up move in x_59f97427 table, clears TASK_TIME_BASED, calls player_exec_state.

functions.name: player_exec_move_ai
functions.summary: Execute move (AI-aware) — checks if AI or human, delegates to player_force_transition or player_exec_move.

functions.name: player_select_move
functions.summary: Move selection/filtering — walks player move list with button input, handles priority, turn-around, timeout triggers, forced transitions. Returns TRUE if a move was selected.

functions.name: player_force_transition
functions.summary: Force transition to specific move state — walks move list, finds first matching transition, executes it.

structs.name: ReplayEntry
structs.summary: Single replay entry: 2x player health, action ID, player index, frame delta.

structs.name: ReplayBuffer
structs.summary: Replay ring buffer: 512 ReplayEntry slots, head/tail indices, frame counters, overflow flag.

structs.name: DbFileHeader
structs.summary: .db file section offsets: pointers to frame data, transition table, AI tactic config, animation counts.

structs.name: AiTacticEntry
structs.summary: AI tactic entry: header + ReplayEntry array.

structs.name: AiEntryHeader
structs.summary: AI entry header: count + s16 array.

subsystems: Character init: loads .tmd/.k3 models, .MOV animations, .k4 shadows, .sp3 sprites, .db/.sym character data
Move selection: processes button input, walks character move list, handles forced transitions
State machine: manages FSM context (TaskNode) with callback stacks
Replay recording: 512-entry ring buffer for demo playback or rollback
Per-frame update: ground detection, animation sync, hit/grab range checks, collision flags
open_questions: What determines _h vs _v character path suffix? Horizontal/vertical split-screen orientation?
ReplayBuffer — is this for demo playback only or also netcode rollback?
Shadow init function (x_ed9e2514, defined in trail.c, now shadow_init) — fully document once trail.c is analyzed.
